name: gridsight
description: GridSight — distribution-grid asset health + European grid mix. Root scripts orchestrate api/ and web/.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix api install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors yellow,cyan "npm --prefix api run dev" "npm --prefix web start"
scripts.build: npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix api run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors yellow,cyan "npm --prefix api start" "npm --prefix web start"
